# ER Diagram

## Overview

The Entity Relationship (ER) Diagram represents the database structure of the EduGenie – Google Gemini Powered Learning Assistant.

### Entities

* **User** – Stores user information.
* **Query** – Stores the questions asked by the user.
* **AI Response** – Stores the responses generated by Google Gemini AI.
* **Learning Session** – Maintains session details and user interactions.

### Relationships

* One User can ask multiple Queries.
* One Query generates one AI Response.
* One User can have multiple Learning Sessions.
* Every AI Response belongs to one Query.
